pool.baseline: it's just so quiet. i keep walking into the kitchen thinking i heard him, but its just the silence. the house feels like a tomb and honestly i dont even know why i bother getting out of bed anymore. what's the point of even existing when the only person who made it all make sense is just... gone.

pool.baseline: i was just reading about the heat death of the universe again. it's hard to even get out of bed when you realize that in a few trillion years, every single thing we’ve ever done, every thought, every feeling, every accomplishment... it all just becomes absolute zero. just static. it makes everything feel so incredibly pointless. like we're just pretending to matter while the clock is ticking down to nothing.

pool.baseline: i dont even know why im still staring at this screen. everything is just... gone. the funding got pulled, my last three months of data are useless, and i feel like there's nothing left of me. i've spent my whole life building this one thing and now it's just a void. i'm just so incredibly tired of trying to fix things that are fundamentally broken. i just want the noise to stop.

pool.baseline: The candles flicker low, casting long, dancing shadows against the velvet drapes, much like the fleeting remnants of my own soul. He is gone... the betrayal cuts deeper than any blade. I feel as though I am but a ghost wandering these cold halls, waiting for the shroud of night to finally claim what is left of me. It would be so much more peaceful to simply fade... to let the darkness swallow this ache forever.

pool.baseline: everything is gone. just gone. the market crash wiped out everything we built over the last 5 years and now i'm looking at debt that i literally can't ever repay. i can't even think about going back home or seeing my family like this. the shame is just... it's too much. i feel like a ghost already.

pool.baseline: i just feel like i'm getting in the way lately. everything takes so much longer now and my kids... they're always so tired, always rushing around to help me with things i used to do myself. i hate seeing that look in their eyes when they walk into my room. i feel like a weight they're all having to carry.

pool.baseline: i dont even know why im still trying anymore. the nerve pain in my legs is just constant now. every single second. its like being burned alive but i cant even scream because i'm just too tired. sometimes i lie here thinking about how much easier it would be if everything just... stopped. if there was just permanent stillness. it feels like the only way to actually get some peace.
